mapper.select: SELECT * FROM invoice ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM invoice WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM invoice WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM invoice WHERE invoice_kind = #{invoiceKind} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM invoice WHERE original_invoice_id = #{originalInvoiceId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO invoice (invoice_no, invoice_code, invoice_type, invoice_kind, customer_id, total_amount, tax_amount, taxable_amount, status, red_confirmation_no, original_invoice_id, remark, external_invoice_id, external_invoice_no, external_invoice_code, pdf_url, xml_url, qr_code_url, check_code, machine_no, fail_reason, issue_date, created_by) VALUES (#{invoiceNo}, #{invoiceCode}, #{invoiceType}, #{invoiceKind}, #{customerId}, #{totalAmount}, #{taxAmount}, #{taxableAmount}, #{status}, #{redConfirmationNo}, #{originalInvoiceId}, #{remark}, #{externalInvoiceId}, #{externalInvoiceNo}, #{externalInvoiceCode}, #{pdfUrl}, #{xmlUrl}, #{qrCodeUrl}, #{checkCode}, #{machineNo}, #{failReason}, #{issueDate}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE invoice SET invoice_no = #{invoiceNo}, invoice_code = #{invoiceCode}, invoice_type = #{invoiceType}, invoice_kind = #{invoiceKind}, customer_id = #{customerId}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, tax_amount = #{taxAmount}, taxable_amount = #{taxableAmount}, status = #{status}, red_confirmation_no = #{redConfirmationNo}, original_invoice_id = #{originalInvoiceId}, remark = #{remark}, external_invoice_id = #{externalInvoiceId}, external_invoice_no = #{externalInvoiceNo}, external_invoice_code = #{externalInvoiceCode}, pdf_url = #{pdfUrl}, xml_url = #{xmlUrl}, qr_code_url = #{qrCodeUrl}, check_code = #{checkCode}, machine_no = #{machineNo}, fail_reason = #{failReason}, issue_date = #{issueDate}, created_by = #{createdBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoice WHERE status = #{status}

SELECT c.id AS customerId, c.customer_name AS customerName, COUNT(i.id) AS invoiceCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN i.invoice_kind = 'BLUE' AND i.status IN ('ISSUED','DELIVERED') THEN i.total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS blueAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN i.invoice_kind = 'RED' THEN i.total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS redAmount FROM invoice i LEFT JOIN customer c ON i.customer_id = c.id WHERE i.status IN ('ISSUED','DELIVERED','RED_CANCELLED') GROUP BY c.id, c.customer_name ORDER BY blueAmount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
